args: const { pathToFileURL } = await import('node:url'); const path = await import('node:path'); const configuredRoot = process.env.SHARED_MEMORY_PLUGIN_ROOT || ''; const root = configuredRoot.includes('${') ? process.cwd() : (configuredRoot || process.cwd()); await import(pathToFileURL(path.resolve(root, '.codex-plugin/plugin-start.mjs')).href);
shared-memory.description: SharedMemory stdio MCP server exposing memory_set, memory_get, memory_search, memory_suggest, memory_map, relation, snapshot, audit, and bulk tools.
